TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Liwkiw a tademaw u kamu(Liwkiw a kamu:„Éę„Éľ„ÉĀ„É•„Éľ„āį„ÉĀ) nuheni nai' ku sakalecada a nakamuan, pasu Yemin a kamu, Ukinawa a kamu, aydaay a Kuyzen a kamu, Pacun-san a kamu, Kunku a kamu, atu Nakuo a kamu. . pulung han u Liwkiw a kumu han, milecad tunu Dipun a kamuan. . Liwkiw a kamuan cinglaw henay, situngusa a misulitay san u Aetay a kamuan, patucek tu Dipun a kamuan ku sapipulung, nika mikinkiway tu kamuan a tademaw idaw ku sasakamuen nuheni, saan Liwkiw a kamu atu Nandaw a kamu misengi sa. . Liwkiw yadah ku kenih nu kamu nuheni, u Ukinawa ku tatelungan nu malucekay a kamuan, nakamuan nuheni caay kalecad, tabaki ku caaya kaw masasulaliday a nakamuan. i Liwkiway a tademaw anu mapulung kuheni nu Dipun ku kamu nuheni, u Ukinawaay a tademaw katuu'd ku pahacengay nu ngalngal musakamu tu nu Dipun a nakamuan. ayda pinaa malebut ku misakamuay tunu Liwkiw a kamuan, u babalaki ku musakamuay, sisa Liwkiw a kamuan hamaw satu a malawpes, musakamuay tu Pacungsan a kamuan atu Nakuo a nakamuan, micidek tu samalawpes sa.
S.PHON: r~…ĺiwkiw a tad…ômaw u kamu(r~…ĺiwkiw a kamu:*******) nuńß…ôni nai Ē~ ° ku sakar~…ĺ…ô ¶ada a nakamuan, pasu j…ômin a kamu, ukinawa a kamu, ajdaaj a kujz…ôn a kamu, pa ¶un-san a kamu, kunku a kamu, atu nakuo a kamu. . pur~…ĺuŇč ńßan u r~…ĺiwkiw a kumu ńßan, mir~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tunu dipun a kamuan. . r~…ĺiwkiw a kamuan ¶iŇčr~…ĺaw ńß…ônaj, situŇčusa a misur~…ĺitaj san u a…ôtaj a kamuan, patu ¶…ôk tu dipun a kamuan ku sapipur~…ĺuŇč, nika mikinkiwaj tu kamuan a tad…ômaw idaw ku sasakamu…ôn nuńß…ôni, saan r~…ĺiwkiw a kamu atu nandaw a kamu mis…ôŇči sa. . r~…ĺiwkiw jadańß ku k…ônińß nu kamu nuńß…ôni, u ukinawa ku tat…ôr~…ĺuŇčan nu mar~…ĺu ¶…ôkaj a kamuan, nakamuan nuńß…ôni ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad, tabaki ku ¶aaja kaw masasur~…ĺar~…ĺidaj a nakamuan. i r~…ĺiwkiwaj a tad…ômaw anu mapur~…ĺuŇč kuńß…ôni nu dipun ku kamu nuńß…ôni, u ukinawaaj a tad…ômaw katuu Ē~ °d ku pańßa ¶…ôŇčaj nu Ňčar~…ĺŇčar~…ĺ musakamu tu nu dipun a nakamuan. ajda pinaa mar~…ĺ…ôbut ku misakamuaj tunu r~…ĺiwkiw a kamuan, u babar~…ĺaki ku musakamuaj, sisa r~…ĺiwkiw a kamuan ńßamaw satu a mar~…ĺawp…ôs, musakamuaj tu pa ¶uŇčsan a kamuan atu nakuo a nakamuan, mi ¶id…ôk tu samar~…ĺawp…ôs sa.
S.FORM: Liwkiw a tademaw u kamu(Liwkiw a kamu:„Éę„Éľ„ÉĀ„É•„Éľ„āį„ÉĀ) nuheni nai' ku sakalecada a nakamuan, pasu Yemin a kamu, Ukinawa a kamu, aydaay a Kuyzen a kamu, Pacun-san a kamu, Kunku a kamu, atu Nakuo a kamu. . pulung han u Liwkiw a kumu han, milecad tunu Dipun a kamuan. . Liwkiw a kamuan cinglaw henay, situngusa a misulitay san u Aetay a kamuan, patucek tu Dipun a kamuan ku sapipulung, nika mikinkiway tu kamuan a tademaw idaw ku sasakamuen nuheni, saan Liwkiw a kamu atu Nandaw a kamu misengi sa. . Liwkiw yadah ku kenih nu kamu nuheni, u Ukinawa ku tatelungan nu malucekay a kamuan, nakamuan nuheni caay kalecad, tabaki ku caaya kaw masasulaliday a nakamuan. i Liwkiway a tademaw anu mapulung kuheni nu Dipun ku kamu nuheni, u Ukinawaay a tademaw katuu'd ku pahacengay nu ngalngal musakamu tu nu Dipun a nakamuan. ayda pinaa malebut ku misakamuay tunu Liwkiw a kamuan, u babalaki ku musakamuay, sisa Liwkiw a kamuan hamaw satu a malawpes, musakamuay tu Pacungsan a kamuan atu Nakuo a nakamuan, micidek tu samalawpes sa.
S.PHON: r~…ĺiwkiw a tad…ômaw u kamu(r~…ĺiwkiw a kamu:*******) nuńß…ôni nai Ē~ ° ku sakar~…ĺ…ô ¶ada a nakamuan, pasu j…ômin a kamu, ukinawa a kamu, ajdaaj a kujz…ôn a kamu, pa ¶un-san a kamu, kunku a kamu, atu nakuo a kamu. . pur~…ĺuŇč ńßan u r~…ĺiwkiw a kumu ńßan, mir~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tunu dipun a kamuan. . r~…ĺiwkiw a kamuan ¶iŇčr~…ĺaw ńß…ônaj, situŇčusa a misur~…ĺitaj san u a…ôtaj a kamuan, patu ¶…ôk tu dipun a kamuan ku sapipur~…ĺuŇč, nika mikinkiwaj tu kamuan a tad…ômaw idaw ku sasakamu…ôn nuńß…ôni, saan r~…ĺiwkiw a kamu atu nandaw a kamu mis…ôŇči sa. . r~…ĺiwkiw jadańß ku k…ônińß nu kamu nuńß…ôni, u ukinawa ku tat…ôr~…ĺuŇčan nu mar~…ĺu ¶…ôkaj a kamuan, nakamuan nuńß…ôni ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad, tabaki ku ¶aaja kaw masasur~…ĺar~…ĺidaj a nakamuan. i r~…ĺiwkiwaj a tad…ômaw anu mapur~…ĺuŇč kuńß…ôni nu dipun ku kamu nuńß…ôni, u ukinawaaj a tad…ômaw katuu Ē~ °d ku pańßa ¶…ôŇčaj nu Ňčar~…ĺŇčar~…ĺ musakamu tu nu dipun a nakamuan. ajda pinaa mar~…ĺ…ôbut ku misakamuaj tunu r~…ĺiwkiw a kamuan, u babar~…ĺaki ku musakamuaj, sisa r~…ĺiwkiw a kamuan ńßamaw satu a mar~…ĺawp…ôs, musakamuaj tu pa ¶uŇčsan a kamuan atu nakuo a nakamuan, mi ¶id…ôk tu samar~…ĺawp…ôs sa.
